title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 271.310 - Preservation of papers in clerk's office, inspection
text:
271.310.  Preservation of papers in clerk's office, inspection. — The county clerk shall receive, file and preserve in his office all such papers sent him, for the inspection of all persons who desire to examine the same.
(RSMo 1939 § 14528) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 12854; 1919 § 4344; 1909 § 848
